calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Carl Salciedo, #2031.

Petitioner Jian Jia Li was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Peter Sung was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication filed today, December 8, 2012.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Eric Jian Jia Li.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
